scan_log.summary: Strong scan day headlined by the Rain Cloud Aroma Diffuser (score 76) — mesmerizing visual design dominates TikTok home-décor content with zero brand moat and excellent margin potential. Couples Oversized Hoodie (score 73) is a Gen Z viral darling with 40%+ margins and maximum public visibility. Glitter Dumpling Squishy (score 72) is surging on Amazon Movers & Shakers as a sensory/fidget product hitting a new demographic wave. Sleep Bonnets (score 70) are a steady growth-phase beauty play with 64% YoY search growth and no dominant brand. Blue Light Therapy Device (score 65) remains in early discovery — the pre-mainstream window identified last week is still open. Electric Pepper Grinder (score 60) is a sleeper kitchen gadget with high triggers and practical value.

products.signal_description: Mesmerizing water-drip aesthetic home décor piece that doubles as a humidifier with 7 night light colors. Visually stunning in TikTok home/aesthetic videos. Confirmed trending across TikTok, Reddit r/AmazonFinds, and multiple dropship trend lists. Generic product with zero IP protection — widely available from Chinese suppliers at $8-15, retailing $35-60.

Double-sided oversized hoodie designed for couples — exploding among Gen Z couples and content creators on TikTok. ~40% profit margin. Highly shareable 'relationship content' vehicle. Generic product, no brand IP, widely sourceable from AliExpress/CJ Dropshipping at $12-18, retailing $35-55.

Glitter-filled dumpling squishy stress relief balls surging on Amazon Movers & Shakers. Sensory/fidget toy category continues to expand beyond kids into adult desk accessories. High impulse-buy potential, extremely low supplier cost ($1-3), retailing $8-15. Multiple variants trending simultaneously (dumpling, cube swirl, butter squeeze).

Sleep bonnets showing 64% YoY growth on Google Trends. Transformed from niche haircare accessory to mainstream beauty must-have driven by awareness of hair care best practices on TikTok and YouTube. Completely generic — no dominant brand, zero IP barriers. Source $1-4, retail $12-25. Strong practical value narrative drives organic sharing.

Comfort-driven phone holder that positions devices for binge-watching and video calls. Soft plush design catches attention in TikTok and Instagram unboxing videos. Generic product, no patents, multiple suppliers. Source $3-6, retail $15-30. Appeals to remote workers and binge-watchers — two growing demographics.

Shower filters gaining steady traction on Google Trends as awareness grows around hard water damage to skin and hair. Wellness and self-care narrative drives organic content on TikTok and Reddit. Generic product category with no dominant brand in the affordable tier. Source $4-8, retail $20-40. Replacement filter cartridges create recurring revenue.

Blue light therapy for acne continues its pre-mainstream trajectory identified in prior scans. Still <5% of red light therapy search volume but growing at similar velocity. No dominant brand in the handheld wand format. Source $10-20, retail $45-80. The awareness-to-supply arbitrage window remains open — few dropshippers have entered yet.

Sleeper kitchen gadget with a gradually rising Google Trends baseline and seasonal spikes. 18K monthly searches, trending positive. Generic product with no IP barriers — hundreds of suppliers. Source $4-8, retail $18-35. High trigger score (used daily in kitchens) and strong practical value. Not 'sexy' but steady and reliable with high repeat purchase potential through gift-giving.
